title: Didn't Catch That
scene: 收银员说话太快，你没听清总价。

turns.cn: 一共二十三块四，要袋子吗？
不好意思，能说慢一点吗？一共多少？
turns.en: Sorry, could you slow down? How much was the total?

title: Ask to Spell It
scene: 前台登记名字，你没听清怎么拼。

turns.en: How do you spell your last name?

turns.cn: W-e-i，伟。能写下来给我确认吗？
turns.en: W-E-I. Wei. Could you write it down for me to confirm?
Sure. Check if this looks right on the screen.

title: Drive-Through Speaker
scene: 快餐得来速喇叭声音模糊，你听不清。

turns.cn: 对不起，喇叭不清楚，我开到窗口点可以吗？
turns.en: Sorry, the speaker's unclear. Can I order at the window?

turns.cn: 要一个巨无霸套餐，可乐换水。
turns.en: One Big Mac meal, swap Coke for water.

turns.cn: 十二块八，第一家窗口付款。
turns.en: Twelve eighty. Pay at the first window.

title: Confirm by Repeating Back
scene: 医生前台口头告诉你预约时间，你复述确认。

turns.cn: 下周三四点十五，史密斯医生。
turns.en: Next Wednesday at four fifteen with Dr. Smith.

turns.cn: 我确认一下：三月二十号，周三，下午四点十五，对吗？
turns.en: Let me confirm: March twentieth, Wednesday, four fifteen PM, right?

title: Heavy Accent
scene: 对方口音重，你礼貌请对方换种说法。

turns.cn: （快速指路）……turn at the light, ya know, the big ole building.
turns.en: …turn at the light, ya know, the big ole building.

turns.cn: 抱歉，我英语不太好，能再说简单一点吗？
turns.en: Sorry, my English isn't great. Could you say that more simply?

turns.cn: 红绿灯左转，白色教堂旁边。
turns.en: Left at the traffic light, by the white church.

title: Elevator Small Talk
scene: 电梯里邻居跟你闲聊天气，你简单回应。

turns.cn: 是啊，我差点忘了穿外套。
turns.en: Yeah. I almost forgot my jacket.

turns.cn: 希望别太大，我还得去超市。
turns.en: Hope it's not too bad. I still need to hit the grocery store.

turns.cn: 八楼，谢谢，Have a good one。
turns.en: Eight, please. Have a good one.

title: Excuse Me in Aisle
scene: 超市过道被挡，你礼貌请人让路。

turns.en: Excuse me. Could I get through?
Oh sorry. My cart was in the way.

turns.cn: 你找番茄酱？在那边尽头。
turns.en: Looking for ketchup? It's at the end there.

title: Bumped Into Someone
scene: 你走路看手机撞到人，赶紧道歉。

turns.cn: 天哪，非常抱歉！您没事吧？
turns.en: Oh gosh, I'm so sorry! Are you okay?
I'm fine. Just watch where you're going.

title: Hold the Door
scene: 你帮别人扶门，简单寒暄。

turns.en: I've got the door for you.

title: Ending a Chat
scene: 同事聊得正欢，但你有会要开，礼貌告辞。

turns.en: Going to the game this weekend?

turns.cn: 可能去，还没买票。我得走了，十点有会。
turns.en: Maybe, I haven't bought tickets yet. I gotta run, meeting at ten.
Sounds good. See you on Slack.

title: Write It Down Please
scene: 物业口头说一串步骤，你请对方写下来。

turns.cn: 先填表，再带ID去B窗口盖章，最后邮箱确认。
turns.en: Fill the form, get a stamp at window B with ID, then confirm by email.

turns.cn: 步骤有点多，能写在这张纸上吗？
turns.en: That's a lot. Could you write it on this paper?
What time does window B close today?

title: Coffee Line Chat
scene: 咖啡店排队，前面的人跟你闲聊。

turns.en: Yeah, but the coffee's worth it.
Two or three times a week on my way to work.
I recommend the oat milk latte.

title: Didn't Understand the Joke
scene: 同事讲了个玩笑你没听懂，诚实询问。

turns.en: …so the PM said that's a feature!

turns.cn: 不好意思，我没get到，能解释一下吗？
turns.en: Sorry, I didn't get it. Could you explain?

turns.cn: 就是说bug被说成新功能，行业老梗。
turns.en: It's when a bug gets called a new feature. Old industry joke.

turns.cn: 没事，我有时候也说太快。
turns.en: No worries. I talk too fast sometimes.

title: Fast Food Counter Rush
scene: 午餐高峰快餐店很吵，店员问你加什么。

turns.cn: 要加薯条还是沙拉？饮料多大？
turns.en: Fries or salad? What size drink?

turns.cn: 请等一下，你说薯条还是什么？
turns.en: One moment. Did you say fries or something else?

turns.cn: 好的，薯条，中杯可乐，在这吃。
turns.en: Okay. Fries, medium Coke, for here.

turns.cn: 九块五，请拿号牌等叫号。
turns.en: Nine fifty. Take a number and wait.

title: Is This the Right Line
scene: 你不确定是否排对窗口，问后面的人。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这是办驾照换新的队吗？
turns.en: Excuse me, is this the line for license renewal?
Yes, but you need a ticket from the kiosk first.
Oh, I didn't get one. Thanks for telling me.
Kiosk by the door. Pick renewal.
Got it. I'll grab a number.
Not too busy. Should be quick.

title: Over the Phone Bad Connection
scene: 手机信号不好，你听不清对方说什么。

turns.cn: 对不起，信号不好，您能大声一点吗？
turns.en: Sorry, bad signal. Could you speak up?

turns.cn: 我说改到周四下午三点。
turns.en: I said Thursday at three PM.

turns.cn: 周四三点，我重复一下对吗？
turns.en: Thursday three PM. Let me repeat that back.

title: Tipping at Restaurant
scene: 结账时你不确定小费该给多少，问朋友。

turns.cn: 服务不错，给百分之十八吧。
turns.en: Service was good. Let's do eighteen percent.

turns.cn: 账单五十八，小费大概多少？
turns.en: The bill is fifty-eight. About how much tip?

turns.cn: 十块出头，可以点屏幕上的百分比。
turns.en: A bit over ten. Tap the percentage on the screen.
Do you tip for takeout too?

turns.cn: 自取可不给，堂食一般要给。

title: Nurse Calls Your Name
scene: 候诊区护士喊名字，你没听清是不是自己。

turns.en: Is that me? I'm Zhang Wei.
Yes. Come with me for vitals.
Should I take off my jacket?

title: Holding the Elevator
scene: 你进电梯，后面有人跑来，你帮忙按住开门。

title: Someone Cut in Line
scene: 排队时有人插到你前面，你礼貌提醒。

turns.en: Excuse me, the line is back here.

title: ATM Instructions Fast
scene: ATM语音提示太快，你没跟上选项。

turns.cn: 你好，机器提示太快，能帮我存款吗？
turns.en: Hi, the ATM talks too fast. Can you help me deposit?
Thanks. I'll try the machine next time.

turns.cn: 可以选中文界面，设置里。
turns.en: You can switch to Chinese in settings.

title: Weather Small Talk Extended
scene: 同事聊天气，你接话并问周末计划。

turns.en: It's blazing out there. Did you bring an umbrella?

turns.cn: 没有，预报说下午有雷雨。
turns.en: No. They said thunderstorms this afternoon.

turns.cn: 我周末去海边，希望别下雨。
turns.en: I'm hitting the beach this weekend. Hope it doesn't rain.

turns.cn: 在家休息，可能去健身房。
turns.en: Relax at home, maybe the gym.

title: Delivery at Door
scene: 快递员敲门，你听不清他说什么。

turns.en: Sorry, could you say that again?

title: Ask to Repeat the Price
scene: 小贩报价太快，你没听清总价。

turns.cn: 一共五美元吗？能再说一次吗？
turns.en: Five dollars total? Could you repeat that?

title: Nice to Meet You
scene: 朋友把你介绍给新朋友，你打招呼。

turns.en: Hi, I'm Sarah. Nice to meet you.

turns.cn: 你好，我是张伟，也很高兴认识你。
turns.en: Hi, I'm Zhang Wei. Nice to meet you too.
I heard you just moved here?

turns.cn: 对，上个月搬来的，还在熟悉环境。
turns.en: Yes, last month. I'm still getting to know the area.
Feel free to ask if you need anything.

title: Morning Greeting
scene: 早上进公司，你和同事打招呼。

turns.en: Is the coffee machine working again?
It's fixed. I just made a cup.

turns.cn: 太好了，我去倒一杯。回头见。
turns.en: Great. I'll grab one. See you around.

title: How's It Going
scene: 你在小区散步，碰到邻居打招呼。

turns.en: Hey Zhang Wei, how's it going?

turns.cn: 那我不耽误你了，回头聊。
turns.en: I won't keep you. Talk later.

title: Long Time No See
scene: 你在超市偶遇很久没见的朋友。

turns.en: Zhang Wei? Long time no see!

turns.cn: 是啊，至少半年了吧？你好吗？
turns.en: Yeah, at least six months? How have you been?
Pretty good. I just started a new job.
That's awesome. Let's grab coffee sometime.
Definitely. I'll add you on WeChat.

title: Introduction by Friend
scene: 朋友聚会，主人介绍你认识其他客人。

turns.en: Hi Mike. I'm Zhang Wei, John's coworker.

turns.cn: John常提起你，说你是项目骨干。
turns.en: John mentions you a lot. Says you're key on the project.

turns.cn: 他过奖了，你们认识很久吗？
turns.en: He's too kind. Have you known him long?
I see. Make yourself at home.

title: Saying Goodbye Casually
scene: 聊了几句后，你要离开跟朋友道别。

turns.cn: 我得走了，今晚很高兴见到你。
turns.en: I should get going. Great seeing you tonight.
Will do. Let's stay in touch.

title: Evening Goodbye at Work
scene: 下班时你和同事道别。

turns.en: I'm heading out. See you tomorrow.
See you tomorrow. Have a good evening.
You too. Don't stay too late.
I'll try. One more email to send.

title: Apologizing for Being Late
scene: 你约朋友喝咖啡迟到了，见面先道歉。

turns.cn: 对不起，路上堵车，让你等了。
turns.en: Sorry I'm late. Traffic was bad.
No worries. I just got here too.

title: School Pickup Greeting
scene: 你接孩子放学，和其他家长打招呼。

turns.cn: 你好，你是小明的爸爸吧？
对，我是张伟，你是Lily的妈妈？
turns.en: Yes, I'm Zhang Wei. You're Lily's mom?
Yes. The kids play together a lot.

turns.cn: 是啊，谢谢你上次邀请生日会。
turns.en: Yeah. Thanks for inviting him to the birthday party.
You're welcome. We could do a playdate sometime.
Sounds good. I'll get your contact.

title: Regular at Coffee Shop
scene: 你是咖啡店熟客，店员跟你寒暄。

title: Meeting Room Small Talk
scene: 会议还没开始，你和客户寒暄几句。

turns.en: Did you have a good drive over?

turns.cn: 挺顺利，谢谢。第一次来你们办公室，环境不错。
turns.en: Pretty smooth, thanks. First time at your office. Nice place.
Thank you. Coffee and water are over there.

turns.cn: 好的。今天您时间还够吗？
turns.en: Great. Do we still have enough time today?
Good. We'll wait for the others.

title: Weekend Plans
scene: 周五下午，同事问你周末有什么计划。

turns.cn: 可能去爬山，天气好的话。
turns.en: Maybe hiking, if the weather holds.

turns.cn: 不错，我带小孩去动物园。
turns.en: Nice. I'm taking the kids to the zoo.
Hope it's not too hot. Have a great weekend!

title: Formal Handshake
scene: 商务活动上，你与对方正式见面握手。

turns.cn: 您好，我是David Chen，请多关照。
turns.en: Hello, I'm David Chen. Pleasure to meet you.

turns.cn: 您好，张伟，也很荣幸认识您。
turns.en: Hello, Zhang Wei. Pleasure to meet you as well.
I hear you lead the Asia-Pacific market?
Yes. I hope we can work together.

title: Compliment and Response
scene: 同事称赞你今天打扮，你礼貌回应。

turns.en: Thanks! I have a client visit today.

turns.cn: 谢谢，你昨天汇报也很棒。
turns.en: Thank you. Your presentation yesterday was great too.

title: Checking In on Someone
scene: 听说同事家里有事，你见面关心一下。

turns.cn: 听说你父亲住院了，现在怎么样？
turns.en: I heard your dad was in the hospital. How is he?
Thanks for asking. He's stable now.

turns.cn: 那就好，有需要帮忙的说一声。
turns.en: I'm glad. Let me know if you need anything.
Take it easy. Don't push yourself.

title: See You Soon
scene: 聚会结束，你和新朋友约好下次见面。

turns.cn: 我也是，下次一起打球吧。
turns.en: Me too. Let's play basketball sometime.

turns.cn: 好啊，周六上午我常去社区球场。
turns.en: Sure. I'm usually at the community court Saturday mornings.

title: Introducing Your Spouse
scene: 朋友来访，你把爱人介绍给朋友认识。

turns.en: John, this is my wife Lisa.
Hi Lisa. Nice to meet you.
Lisa, this is John, my former coworker.

turns.cn: 张伟常提起你，说你是大厨。
turns.en: Zhang Wei talks about your cooking all the time.

turns.cn: 她今晚做了中餐，随便吃。
turns.en: She made Chinese food tonight. Help yourself.

title: Introducing Your Kids
scene: 邻居来访，你让孩子出来打招呼。

turns.en: This is my son Tommy and my daughter Amy.
Tommy's in third grade. Amy's in first.

turns.cn: 我家孩子在同一所学校。
turns.en: My kids go to the same school.

turns.cn: 那太好了，以后可能常见面。
turns.en: Great. We'll probably see you around.

title: Merry Christmas
scene: 圣诞节前，你在公司和同事互致节日问候。

turns.cn: 在本地过，亲戚来我们家。
turns.en: Staying local. Relatives are coming to our place.
Nice. Happy New Year in advance!
Happy New Year. Enjoy the break!

title: Happy New Year
scene: 新年第一个工作日，你和同事互相拜年。

turns.cn: 新年快乐！假期过得怎么样？
turns.en: Happy New Year! How was your break?
Happy New Year! Pretty relaxing. You?
Let's make it a good year.

title: Happy Thanksgiving
scene: 感恩节前，你和朋友简短互致问候。

turns.cn: 感恩节快乐！你去谁家吃饭？
turns.en: Happy Thanksgiving! Whose place are you going to?

turns.cn: 在家做火鸡，请几个朋友。
turns.en: Hosting at home with a few friends.

title: Happy Birthday
scene: 同事生日，你在办公室送上祝福。

turns.cn: 生日快乐！蛋糕看起来不错。
turns.en: Happy birthday! The cake looks great.
Thank you! I didn't expect you to remember.

turns.cn: 日历上写了。有什么计划吗？
turns.en: It's on the calendar. Any plans?

turns.cn: 好好享受，今天别加班太晚。
turns.en: Enjoy. Don't work too late today.

title: Congratulations New Baby
scene: 同事休完产假回来，你当面祝贺。

turns.cn: 谢谢！她很好，晚上还是常醒。
turns.en: Thanks! She's great. Still up a lot at night.

turns.cn: 恭喜当妈妈，照片真可爱。
turns.en: Congrats on the baby. The photos are adorable.

turns.cn: 有需要灵活办公就说一声。
turns.en: Let us know if you need flexible hours.

title: Welcoming Guests Home
scene: 朋友第一次来你家，你门口迎接。

turns.en: Thanks for having me. Should I take off my shoes?
Thanks. You can hang your coat over there.
I brought a bottle of wine.
That's so kind. Make yourself at home.

title: Back from Vacation
scene: 同事度假回来，你热情打招呼。

turns.cn: 欢迎回来！晒黑了不少啊。
turns.en: Welcome back! You got some sun.

turns.cn: 羡慕，邮件我尽量处理了。
turns.en: Lucky you. I covered your emails as much as I could.
Thanks so much. Lunch is on me.
Deal. Tell me about the trip.

title: Casual What's Up
scene: 你在校园遇到同学，随意打招呼。

turns.en: Not much. Just got out of class. You?

title: New Neighbor Moving In
scene: 新邻居搬来，你上门自我介绍。

turns.cn: 你好，我是隔壁的张伟，欢迎搬来。
turns.en: Hi, I'm Zhang Wei from next door. Welcome to the building.
Thank you! I'm Emily. Just moved in.

turns.cn: 有需要帮忙搬东西说一声。
turns.en: Let me know if you need help with anything.

turns.cn: 太感谢了，这边垃圾哪天收？
turns.en: That's kind. Which day is trash pickup?
Got it. Nice to meet you.

title: Thanks for Having Us
scene: 聚会结束，你向主人道谢告别。

turns.en: Tonight was wonderful. Thanks for having us.

turns.cn: 别客气，你们能来我很高兴。
turns.en: Don't mention it. I'm glad you came.
I'm glad you liked it. Come anytime.
We will. We should head out. Good night.

title: Graduation Congrats
scene: 朋友大学毕业，你当面祝贺。

turns.en: Congratulations on graduating! So proud of you.

turns.cn: 先找工作，可能留在这边。
turns.en: Job hunting. Maybe staying around here.

turns.cn: 需要推荐或改简历找我。
turns.en: Hit me up for referrals or resume help.

title: Get Well Soon Visit
scene: 同事生病在家，你带水果探望。

turns.cn: 听说你感冒了，感觉怎么样？
turns.en: I heard you caught a cold. How are you feeling?
Brought some fruit. Don't mention it.
You're too kind. Don't worry about work.
Rest up. We'll catch up when you're back.

title: Greeting the Doorman
scene: 你每天进出公寓，和门卫例行问候。

turns.cn: 早上好！今天有我的包裹吗？
turns.en: Good morning! Any packages for me?
